account.name: Pantheon of Rod and Iriy (Test Data)

roles.name: Volkhv of the Sacred Grove
roles.description: Eldest priest-seer who reads the runes of the platform and shapes the over-arching design.

roles.name: Voivode of the Druzhina
roles.description: War-leader of the delivery band — keeps the timeline, the shields, and the prince's promises.

roles.name: Keeper of the Iriy Records
roles.description: Steward of the heavenly ledgers — fields, layouts, permissions and the names of every soul.

roles.name: Smith of Svarog's Forge
roles.description: Hammers Apex and LWC at the celestial anvil where the sun was first hammered out.

roles.name: Knyaz of the Western Druzhina
roles.description: Prince of the western host — sets the standards and trains the senior smiths of the realm.

roles.name: Bogatyr of the Eastern Steppe
roles.description: Veteran champion who patrols the borders of customer requirements with seasoned skill.

roles.name: Otrok of the Eastern Steppe
roles.description: Young squire of the steppe — carries discovery and configuration under the bogatyr's eye.

roles.name: Bridge-Smith of Kalinov Most
roles.description: Architect of the great bridge of Kalinov — designer of every span between Salesforce and the world below.

roles.name: Wright of Kalinov Most
roles.description: Lays the planks of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge-Smith's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice of Kalinov Most
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batches, callouts and the careful charms of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of the Rusalka Pools
roles.description: Tends the wounded build — finds curses, broken charms and ill omens before the prince ever sees them.

roles.name: Skomorokh-in-Chief
roles.description: Master of the wandering players — leads the heralds, the songs, and every banner of the brand.

roles.name: Bayan of the Princely Hall
roles.description: Court bard — strategist of campaigns, weaver of byliny that summon customers to the gate.

roles.name: Skomorokh of the Marketplace
roles.description: Carries the campaign into the squares and steppe — content, creative and the daily ride.

roles.name: Scribe of the Veche
roles.description: Records the will of the people's assembly — translates between mortal Customer and the volkhv's design.

roles.name: Master Smith of the Western Forge
roles.description: Senior Numenorean smith of the west — forges the deepest customizations and mentors the apprentices.

roles.name: Otrok of the Eastern Forge
roles.description: Newest squire — learning the simple charms of declarative configuration before taking up Apex.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Domestic Spirits — Hearth & Home Service Cloud

heroes-and-bogatyrs.themedRole: Master Smith of the Western Forge

chief-deities.name: Council at the World Tree
chief-deities.description: Discovery sign-off — the gods convene at the roots of the World Oak.

chief-deities.name: Striking of the Thunder-Axe
chief-deities.description: Build kickoff: Perun's axe struck against Svarog's anvil — the first lightning falls.

chief-deities.name: Audience in Iriy
chief-deities.description: Mid-project gate: stewardship review in the heavenly garden.

chief-deities.name: Veles' Cattle-Tally
chief-deities.description: Phase invoice trigger: the underworld god counts every herd of progress.

chief-deities.name: Crowning of Dazhbog
chief-deities.description: Go-Live: the sun-god takes his throne and rides across the new sky.

chief-deities.name: Mokosh's Hand-off
chief-deities.description: Hyper-care close: the mother-goddess weaves the project into the great fate-loom.

domestic-spirits.name: Blessing of the Threshold
domestic-spirits.description: Project kickoff: salt and bread laid upon the doorstep of the new izba.

domestic-spirits.name: Lighting of the Hearth-Fire
domestic-spirits.description: Build phase: the stove kindled — the Domovoi takes up residence.

domestic-spirits.name: Bannik's Bathhouse Inspection
domestic-spirits.description: UAT gate: the bath-spirit's three knocks must come back true.

domestic-spirits.name: Field-Walk with the Polevoi
domestic-spirits.description: Pre-launch walk-through: every furrow blessed, every charm in place.

domestic-spirits.name: Housewarming Feast
domestic-spirits.description: Go-Live: the household celebrates — stove lit, spirits fed, doors thrown open.

domestic-spirits.name: Final Hearth-Tithe
domestic-spirits.description: Final invoice: a bowl of porridge and a coin left for the Domovoi.

heroes-and-bogatyrs.name: Muster at Kyiv
heroes-and-bogatyrs.description: Project kickoff: the bogatyrs assemble at Prince Vladimir's court.

heroes-and-bogatyrs.name: Ride to the Steppe Frontier
heroes-and-bogatyrs.description: Build phase: the druzhina rides east to meet the threat.

heroes-and-bogatyrs.name: Single Combat with Sokolnik
heroes-and-bogatyrs.description: UAT gate: champion-versus-champion — the build holds against the strongest blow.

heroes-and-bogatyrs.name: Slaying of Solovei the Brigand
heroes-and-bogatyrs.description: Go-Live: Ilya Muromets binds the whistling robber and clears the road.

heroes-and-bogatyrs.name: Triumphal Return to Kyiv
heroes-and-bogatyrs.description: Hyper-care close: the heroes return, songs sung, banners raised.

heroes-and-bogatyrs.name: Bylina at the Princely Feast
heroes-and-bogatyrs.description: Final invoice: Bayan strums the gusli and recounts every deed for payment.

underworld-monsters.name: Crossing of Kalinov Bridge
underworld-monsters.description: Discovery: project scope crosses into the realm of Nav.

underworld-monsters.name: Forging Koschei's Death-Needle
underworld-monsters.description: Build: the secret of every safeguard hidden — egg in duck, duck in hare, hare in chest.

underworld-monsters.name: Audit by Baba Yaga
underworld-monsters.description: Solution review with the witch in the hut on chicken legs.

underworld-monsters.name: Three-Headed Dragon Subdued
underworld-monsters.description: Go-Live: Zmey Gorynych contained — every head accounted for in the runbook.

underworld-monsters.name: Marzanna Drowned in the River
underworld-monsters.description: Project close: the winter-witch effigy cast into the river — the cursed system retired.

underworld-monsters.name: Final Tribute to Nav
underworld-monsters.description: Final invoice from the underworld — paid in coin, not in souls.

Perun.notes: Thunder-axe re-tempering at Svarog's forge — quarterly.

Veles.notes: Descent to the underworld to count the cattle of the dead.

Mokosh.notes: Re-warping the loom of fate — strands tangled again.

Dazhbog.notes: Solar eclipse — chariot in the workshop.

Domovoi.notes: Stove cleaning — refusing to work until the household sweeps the corner.

Bannik.notes: Sauna deep-clean — the third bath of the night must be his alone.

Leshy.notes: Forest census — counts every wolf and mushroom personally.

Rusalka.notes: Rusalka Week — combing hair on the riverbank, do not approach.

Ilya Muromets.notes: Pilgrimage to the Caves of Kyiv — annual penance.

Dobrynya Nikitich.notes: Visiting his mother in Ryazan — she insists.

Sadko.notes: Underwater command performance for the Sea Tsar.

Baba Yaga.notes: Hut maintenance — chicken legs need re-shoeing.

Koschei the Deathless.notes: Re-hiding the death-needle — last spot was getting obvious.

Zmey Gorynych.notes: Middle head has a sore throat — cannot breathe fire.

Marzanna.notes: Winter recess — frost duties suspended until the equinox.
